evals.prompt: Extract all the fonts from https://gt-pressura.com and save them to ./fonts/
evals.expected_output: Font files downloaded and organized into ./fonts/<family-name>/ subdirectories

assertions.description: A ./fonts/ directory was created in the working directory
Fonts are organized into subdirectories named by font family (not all flat in ./fonts/)
At least one .woff2 file was downloaded
GT Pressura (or a close variant of that name) is identified as a font family
Claude reports a clear summary of what was downloaded (file count, sizes, families)
